description: §48.5.2 — a `lift` inside a `fn` body that targets a `~` accumulator initialized OUTSIDE the `fn` boundary SHALL fire E-FN-008. `~acc = []` is declared at program scope; `fn helper()` does `lift "from-fn"`, which would accumulate past the `fn` boundary. Reject-path (pos) half of the E-FN-008 pin; the clean neg is `fn/lift-local-accumulator-clean` (a `fn`-local `~` closed with `return ~` — silent, §48.5.1).
rationale: §48.5.2: `lift` inside a `fn` may only accumulate into a `~` initialized within the same `fn` body; a `lift` targeting a `~` from outer scope crosses the `fn` boundary (a hidden outer-scope mutation) and is E-FN-008.
